channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump approves Saudi nuclear deal allowing uranium enrichment amid US efforts to end Tehran's program
item.description: The 30-year agreement permits Saudi uranium enrichment, which experts warn could lead to weapons development.

item.title: Texas town sues to block Trump's border wall, citing threat to Rio Grande levees
item.description: Presidio argues the $46 billion wall could damage Rio Grande levees and bypass the Rivers and Harbors Act.

item.title: Trump Accounts attract 6.5 million sign-ups, but some families await promised $1,000 funding
item.description: The baby investment accounts seed $1,000 for babies born 2025-2028, though some families face delays beyond the promised 10 days.

item.title: Former Seattle U.S. attorney sues Trump administration after being fired an hour after swearing-in
item.description: The lawsuit claims Roger Rogoff's dismissal was unconstitutional and seeks to void it and temporarily reinstate him.
